CREATE TABLE test_view (id INT, name VARCHAR(100), value XML);
INSERT INTO test_view (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'View1', '<root><element>Value1</element></root>');
INSERT INTO test_view (id, name, value) VALUES (2, 'View2', '<root><element>Value2</element></root>');
INSERT INTO test_view (id, name, value) VALUES (3, 'View3', '<root><element>Value3</element></root>');
SELECT xml_view_dtd('SELECT * FROM test_view WHERE id = 1') AS dtd_output;
SELECT xml_view_dtd('SELECT * FROM test_view WHERE name LIKE ''View%''') AS dtd_output;
SELECT xml_view_dtd('SELECT id, name FROM test_view WHERE value IS NOT NULL') AS dtd_output;
SELECT xml_view_dtd('SELECT id, name, value FROM test_view ORDER BY id DESC') AS dtd_output;
CREATE TABLE another_view (item_id INT, description VARCHAR(200), xml_data XML);
INSERT INTO another_view (item_id, description, xml_data) VALUES (1, 'Item1', '<data><field>Data1</field></data>');
INSERT INTO another_view (item_id, description, xml_data) VALUES (2, 'Item2', '<data><field>Data2</field></data>');
SELECT xml_view_dtd('SELECT a.item_id, a.description FROM test_view AS t JOIN another_view AS a ON t.id = a.item_id') AS dtd_output;
SELECT xml_view_dtd('SELECT t.id, t.value, a.description FROM test_view AS t INNER JOIN another_view AS a ON t.id = a.item_id WHERE t.id IN (SELECT id FROM test_view WHERE id < 3)') AS dtd_output;
